link.text: All Africa Cup of Nations News

articles.headline: Coaches kept calm during VAR delay because 'we represent Africa' - Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso
articles.description: Mamelodi Sundowns head coach Miguel Cardoso said that keeping calm, despite the VAR issues which delayed the second half of the CAF Champions League final first leg, was vital for Africa's footballing image.

images.name: VAR delay CAF final [1296x729]
images.caption: Referees and officials speak during a 20-minute delay to the start of the second half of the CAF Champions League final first leg, with VAR ruled out for the rest of the match due to technical difficulties.
images.credit: Phill Magakoe / AFP via Getty Images

articles.headline: CAF announce 'unanimous' support for Infantino's FIFA presidency re-election
articles.description: The Confederation of African Football (CAF) has publicly confirmed unanimous backing from its 54 member associations for Gianni Infantino's re-election as FIFA president.

images.name: Motsepe photo 250609 [1296x729]
images.caption: President of FIFA Gianni Infantino (R) and President of the Confederation of African Football (CAF) Patrice Motsepe (L).

images.name: Will José Mourinho become the new Real Madrid manager in the summer?
images.caption: Gab Marcotti and Julien Laurens react to reports linking José Mourinho with a return to Real Madrid in the summer.

articles.headline: FIFA investigate Kenyan FA amidst AFCON hosting uncertainty
articles.description: FIFA have launched an investigation into the crisis engulfing the Kenyan Football Federation (FKF) after the federation's National Executive Committee voted to suspend and replace its own president.

images.name: McDonald Mariga [1296x729]
images.caption: Former Kenya international and Inter Milan midfielder McDonald Mariga was named acting Kenyan FA president on Friday.

images.name: Michael Carrick: Bruno Fernandes deserves player of the season award
images.caption: Manchester United caretaker manager Michael Carrick has praised Bruno Fernandes' performance in their 2-1 victory over Brentford.

articles.headline: CAF general secretary resigns amid AFCON final controversy
articles.description: CAF general secretary Veron Mosengo-Omba has resigned as the organisation's turbulent period continues.

images.name: Edouard Mendy of Senegal lifts the Africa Cup of Nations trophy [1296x729]
images.alt: PARIS, FRANCE - MARCH 28: Edouard Mendy of Senegal lifts the Africa Cup of Nations trophy in the stands prior to the international friendly match between Senegal and Peru on March 28, 2026 at Stade de France in Paris, France.

images.name: Édouard Mendy slams CAF over AFCON final decision
images.caption: Édouard Mendy says CAF officials need to get on the same level as African football.

articles.headline: Édouard Mendy slams CAF over AFCON final decision
articles.description: Édouard Mendy says CAF officials need to get on the same level as African football.

images.name: Édouard Mendy slams CAF over AFCON final decision
images.caption: Édouard Mendy says CAF officials need to get on the same level as African football.

articles.headline: Senegal parade AFCON trophy in France despite CAF ruling
articles.description: Senegal players paraded the Africa Cup of Nations trophy in front of thousands of fans on Saturday, despite the Confederation of African Football's decision to strip the country of the title.

images.name: Edouard Mendy of Senegal lifts the Africa Cup of Nations trophy [1296x729]
images.alt: PARIS, FRANCE - MARCH 28: Edouard Mendy of Senegal lifts the Africa Cup of Nations trophy in the stands prior to the international friendly match between Senegal and Peru on March 28, 2026 at Stade de France in Paris, France.

images.name: Senegal's players parade with The African Cup of Nations trophy  [1296x729]
images.alt: Senegal's players parade with The African Cup of Nations trophy ahead of the international friendly football match between Senegal and Peru at the Stade de France in Saint-Denis, north of Paris on March 28, 2026.
images.credit: JULIEN DE ROSA / AFP via Getty Images

images.name: How Senegal won dramatic 2025 AFCON final
images.caption: Recap the action from the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations final as Senegal defeated Morocco in extra time to become champions for the second time.
